response.justification: Candidate has deep, broad engineering experience but the resume shows essentially no recent professional C++ work — only a brief C/C++ stint at National Instruments around 2000-2001 and a bachelor-thesis project. No Windows-platform C++ experience, no SQL Server/Oracle exposure, and no fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain background. The listed skill stack centers on TypeScript/Node/DLang, which does not align with a mid-senior C++ capital-markets role.
strengths: Long engineering tenure with strong software craftsmanship, TDD, and CI/CD practices
Exposure to low-latency, high-throughput systems and SQL fundamentals
Excellent written communication evident from workshops, talks, and documentation
concerns: No substantive recent C++ experience on Windows (mandatory requirement)
No fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain experience
No SQL Server or Oracle experience; DB background is MongoDB/MySQL

key_factors.factor: No fixed income / capital markets domain
